children.heading: Advisory Committee
children.label: 1 Advisory Committee
children.text: The term “Advisory Committee” means the Advisory Committee established under .section 698u–5 of this title

children.heading: Preserve
children.label: 2 Preserve
children.text: The term “Preserve” means the Tallgrass Prairie National Preserve established by .section 698u–2 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.heading: Trust
children.label: 4 Trust
children.text: The term “Trust” means the National Park Trust, Inc., a District of Columbia nonprofit corporation, or any successor-in-interest.
